subcodes.first_line: O concourse of the earth! By God, the Almighty hath indeed come in His glory, and the banners of guidance have been raised upon every lofty mountain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الارض تالله قد اتی الله بمجده و ارتفع اعلام الهدایه علی کل جبل بادخ
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @proclamation to the people of the world, @self-description of God; God's self-remembrance
